title: On a zero-sum problem arising from factorization theory
author_string: Aqsa Bashir, Alfred Geroldinger, Qinghai Zhong
abstract: We study a zero-sum problem dealing with minimal zero-sum sequences of maximal length over finite abelian groups. A positive answer to this problem yields a structural description of sets of lengths with maximal elasticity in transfer Krull monoids over finite abelian groups.
